title.en: The Xuanyin Sect is not weak, although it is fa...

content.en:
The Xuanyin Sect is not weak, although it is far inferior to the Void Heaven Bloodline, nor is it as good as the top big forces such as the Giant Axe City, the Chaos Trading House, and the Mercenary Alliance, but it has hundreds of thousands of True Ancestors, including three top True Ancestors.

However, such a top-notch power was wiped out in a short period of time, not only was the True Ancestor almost completely wiped out, but even the Xuanyin True Kingdom was shattered, and countless living beings fell.

The ones who did it were the Sixfold Heavenly Strength Heavenly Spirit Sect, the Fivefold Heaven Force Innocent Sect, the Fivefold Heaven Force Red Lotus Palace, and the Fivefold Heaven Force Shanyun Pavilion.

These forces worked together to destroy the Xuanyin Sect in a short period of time, so that the Xuanyin Sect had no time to ask for help, and there was no way to even escape.

It can be said that the foundation of the Xuanyin Sect in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is completely gone.

Now.

The Xuanyin Sect in the chaos of the Dao Mountain Realm was extremely angry, losing hundreds of thousands of True Ancestors, what a tragic loss!

At this moment, the hope of the future of the Xuanyin Sect was completely ruined, and it was basically eliminated by this great era, and there was no way to compete with other forces in the future.

Several Dao Ancestors of the Xuanyin Sect were very angry, and they were eager to enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and rush to the mountain gates of those great forces.

It's a pity that Dao Ancestor can't enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm at all, and it is useless to forcibly descend to the incarnation.

The Xuanyin Sect was destroyed, and the other forces were terrified.

Originally, according to the plans of the major forces, as long as they found a suitable excuse, destroying a Zhantian Sect should have little impact, and it would not cause the domain forces to attack them.

However, they underestimated the relationship between the Zhan Tian Sect and other forces, and as long as a few Middle Triple Heaven forces were united, they were not afraid of the many big forces in the Dao Mountain Realm at all.

There are indeed many True Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm, but there are too few Top True Ancestors and Supreme True Ancestors, and this is a flaw.

Once multiple Supreme True Ancestors launched an attack and killing, all the great forces would fall into fear.

And this time the destruction of the Xuanyin Sect is a warning, if the major forces dare to jointly attack them, there will be more top forces destroyed.

Of course, the Heavenly Spirit Sect and several other middle and triple heavenly forces did not dare to destroy another force, otherwise they would really let the top major forces unite at all costs, not to mention gathering 2 million True Ancestors, even if they gathered 20 million True Ancestors, they would be able to gather them.

Once that time comes, if the Heavenly Spirit Sect does not escape, it will also be wiped out.

Therefore, after the Heavenly Spirit Sect and the other three Five Heavenly Forces destroyed the Xuanyin Sect, they issued a warning notice to the major forces.

The Heavenly Spirit Sect will not really take full revenge on the major forces, and they are not stupid.

Unless all the Middle Triple Heaven forces are dispatched, all the forces in the Dao Mountain Realm and the Xuanxu Ancient Realm can be destroyed.

--------------

Void Heaven True Country, Terran Territory.

Ye Tian learned about some of the circumstances after the Xuanyin Sect was destroyed, and couldn't help muttering: "The Heavenly Spirit Sect made a move, it is estimated that it is not necessarily to stand up for the Battle Heavenly Sect, maybe this is just one of the reasons. Maybe there will be a Triple Heaven Force that will let the Heavenly Spirit Sect take action on behalf of the Heavenly Spirit Sect and suppress the major forces. "

As for why the Upper Triple Heaven Forces didn't take action in person, it was because they were afraid!

There is no way, there are too many True Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm, if you go all out, it is not very difficult to destroy one or two Upper Triple Heaven forces, but the price is too great.

Therefore, the Upper Triple Heaven Force will let the Sixfold Heaven Force suppress the forces of the Daoshan Realm.

As long as the forces of the Daoshan Realm do not unite, it will be a plate of scattered sand, just a bunch of ants.

Creating fear and making it difficult for the major forces to completely unite is the purpose of the Heavenly Spirit Sect and others.

Many forces may see this, but they can't break the situation, after all, each force has different ideas, and many forces are afraid that if they get involved again, they will be the next to be destroyed.

Therefore, the major forces suspended cooperation and did not dare to attack the Central Triple Heaven forces again.

The current situation seemed to be stable again, but Ye Tian knew very well that in the near future, the Daoshan Realm and the Domain Realm forces would eventually fight again and again.

In the end, the two forces were no longer divided into each other, and all of them belonged to the forces of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there was no faction.

But the price of this is that many forces have perished, and only a group of the strongest forces and a number of subordinate forces remain.

In the following days, there were many small frictions in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but there were no major wars.

However, the strength of the Dao Mountain Realm was growing, while the strength of the Middle Triple Heaven Force and the Upper Triple Heaven Force was progressing slowly, after all, they had already reached a peak, and it was so difficult to go further.

Therefore, these Middle Triple Heaven Forces and Upper Triple Heaven Forces could only recruit more geniuses and cultivate more True Ancestors.

Unconsciously, millions of years have passed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er came to Ye Tian to discuss something.

"Jiu'er, what are you looking for me?" Ye Tian asked.

Ouyang Jiu'er said mysteriously: "Good thing! There is a big benefit, do you want to do it?"

"What's the benefit?"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he hurriedly asked.

Being able to be called a benefit by Ouyang Jiu'er is definitely not an ordinary benefit.

"An ancient ruin, it is an ancient relic of the domain realm, and the preliminary judgment is that it is a branch of the Nine Heavens Force a long time ago, and it is of great value!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Where did you get the news?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

"The news I got from the Heavenly Spirit Sect!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "Not long ago, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was very lively, and the Heavenly Spirit Sect also destroyed the Xuanyin Sect, so I took a look at the excitement from the Heavenly Spirit Sect, and found a secret. It turned out that the Heavenly Spirit Sect was a subsidiary force of the Zixia Sect, but no one knew about it. I saw that in a relic space of the Heavenly Spirit Sect, many true ancestors of the Zixia Sect were digging a ruin, and I didn't dare to get close, so I came back!"

"You haven't been discovered, have you?" Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

"Naturally, I haven't been discovered, so they want to easily find me?" Ouyang Jiu'er showed a look of disdain, and then said: "I will use a Dao technique to conceal my whereabouts, called the Shadowless Divine Step, and I will not leave cause and effect, no traces, and no rules and formations when walking. The only flaw is that I can't hide the Dao Ancestor who is higher than my cultivation, and if I look closely, I can still see through the Shadowless Divine Step!"

"Such an awesome Dao technique, can you hand it over to me?" Ye Tian said in his heart.

"I just have a inheritance, I have run out, and I have just started, so I can't make a inheritance for you!" Ouyang Jiu'er explained.

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian regretted it on the surface, but in fact, he knew in his heart that Ouyang Jiu'er was unwilling to teach him the Shadowless Divine Step.

But it's right to think about it carefully, he has nothing to do with Ouyang Jiu'er, why did he teach him the Shadowless God Trail Technique?

He knows a lot of Taoism, didn't he teach Ouyang Jiu'er, and he didn't give Ouyang Jiu'er many treasures on his body!

Thinking about it like this, Ye Tian was much more indifferent.

Next, the two of them discussed, preparing to infiltrate the ancient ruins as well.

Before the action, Ye Tian learned about Ouyang Jiu'er's strength, the other party's strength progress was very exaggerated, and now he was already a top True Ancestor, and he was proficient in life-saving methods, and it was difficult for ordinary Supreme True Ancestors to hurt her.

And Ye Tian also showed his strength, the invincible True Ancestor's combat power made Ouyang Jiu'er shocked, and he kept marveling at Ye Tian's rapid progress.

In the past, it was Ye Tian who took Ouyang Jiu'er to act, but this time it was Ouyang Jiu'er who took Ye Tian to act.

I saw Ouyang Jiu'er take Ye Tian to perform the Shadowless Divine Step, the two of them walked in the Void Heaven, walked out from the Void Heaven True Country, and met many True Ancestors from afar along the way, but none of the True Ancestors found their traces.

Witnessing such a Dao technique, Ye Tian was even more moved.

The two of them passed through one territory after another, and finally came to a space under the command of the Heavenly Spirit Sect.

The road was unblocked, and the two of them came to a place not very far from the ancient ruins, and looked in the direction of the ruins, only to see that the Zixia Sect had sent many True Ancestors to guard the periphery.

Ye Tian probed for a while and estimated the combat power of the outer guards.

"At least two Supreme True Ancestors and thirty top True Ancestors, as well as tens of thousands of elite True Ancestors on patrol, the strength of the Zixia Sect here is very strong! Moreover, outside the space, there are a large number of Heavenly Spirit Sect True Ancestors guarding them. If it weren't for your Shadowless Divine Step, ordinary True Ancestors wouldn't have been able to get close to this place at all!"

Ye Tian said.

"Well, I'm still very good!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said with a smile.
